meta.name: Stakeholder Update Generator
meta.description: Transform sprint data, OKR progress, and key decisions into polished, audience-appropriate stakeholder updates for board, execs, and team.

parameters.content:
## 15 — Stakeholder Update Generator

**Required:** OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**How to use:** Send a JSON payload to the webhook with sprint/OKR/decision data, OR connect the output of workflows 11 and 14 to this workflow's webhook.

**Audience types:** board | exec | team | customer

**Schedule:** Biweekly (1st and 15th, 09:00)

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { period: body.period || new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), audience: body.audience || 'exec', highlights: body.highlights || body.wins || [], challenges: body.challenges || body.blockers || [], metrics: body.metrics || [], decisions: body.decisions || [], next_steps: body.next_steps || [], context: body.context || '' } }];

values.content: You are an executive communications writer. Write clear, appropriately detailed updates for different stakeholder audiences. Never add data not in the input. Adapt tone to the audience (board=concise/financial; exec=strategic; team=detailed/human; customer=benefit-focused).
